ddls:
CREATE TABLE "walls" (
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall */,
  "x_centroid" REAL /* X-coordinate of the wall's centroid in meters */,
  "y_centroid" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the wall's centroid in meters */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the wall in meters */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the wall in meters */,
  "vertical_rho" REAL /* Vertical density percentage of the wall material */,
  "horizontal_rho" REAL /* Horizontal density percentage of the wall material */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the wall (e.g., N/S, E/W) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the building the wall belongs to */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the material used for the wall */,
  "construction_date" TEXT /* Date when the wall was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the wall was last inspected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walls_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walls_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building's location */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the building's owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the building's owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., Concrete, Brick) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material in kg/m³ */,
  "elastic_modulus" REAL /* Elastic modulus of the material in MPa */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Compressive strength of the material in MPa */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the material in MPa */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the material's supplier */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the material's supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or findings from the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., scheduled, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification details of the inspector */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the inspector */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the inspector (e.g., structural, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection that led to the maintenance action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the sensor is located in */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "reading" REAL /* Reading from the sensor */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_conditions" (
  "wall_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall condition */,
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wall the condition is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the wall (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was assessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_conditions_wall_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_id") REFERENCES walls ("wall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_materials" (
  "wall_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall material */,
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wall the material is used in */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_materials_wall_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_id") REFERENCES walls ("wall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_repairs" (
  "wall_repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall repair */,
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wall the repair was done on */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date when the repair was done */,
  "repair_description" TEXT /* Description of the repair */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the repair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_repairs_wall_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_id") REFERENCES walls ("wall_id")
)
